description: I able to increase my productivity in creating websites within hours and this helps me meet my project deadlines.
author: Tshepo M.
pros: Its an easy to use minimalistic website builder great for building ecommerce websites from beautiful and striking templates within a couple of hours even if you are a beginner.
cons: You are limited in terms of SEO since it provides mostly front end development.

review_title: Great website platform for multi-media intensive companies
description: Longtime Strikingly user. So appreciate the easy web design and the powerful mixed media setup. The deeper menus are a less clear, but doable.
author: Damon B.
pros: Great with multimedia, WYSIWYG design is excellent.
cons: The platform dashboard can be quite confusing.

author: Willie W.
pros: Ease of setting up a website. You can publish directly from the site, but you have to use their photos, which you can't move anywhere else.
cons: Support, cost of anything beyond subscription is way over priced. The company uses deceptive practices to sell products. They track people that use your site, among other things. You can't use any photos from the site anywhere else, like background photo's . Deceptiveness of the company. Example: I asked a customer service rep. if I could point my domain to another host. It took him 30 minutes with me on the line to give him that answer. If you can go with another company, I would. If I had a chance to do it over again, I would look elsewhere.

review_title: Excellent, elegant, and simple web design software for any level
description: Excellent, elegant, and simple web design software for any level. Limitations because of simplicity and pricing tiers, but I have used the free version for almost a decade and still love it. Never needed to upgrade because they offer so much!
author: Ally S.
pros: Strikingly has been my go-to for basic web design software for almost a decade now. I have been able to create dozens of websites for friends, family, and several businesses and even a nonprofit. Because it's simple it is intuitive to use and teach. We receive compliments on the ease of navigation every single time someone visits the site for the first time. Customer support is very helpful and always available, and they are always coming out with new and very helpful features like appointment scheduling.
cons: There are very few things I dislike about Strikingly, but one thing that has bothered me over the years is the inability to create a website under my own account and then "transfer ownership" to another account. For example, I help folks design their site and provide support after as they get comfortable using Strikingly. This allows for complete independence for someone to have their own, custom-built website and run it themselves. But there is no way to simple transfer ownership - I have to maintain admin rights to the site and simply share the site with that other person as a "Team". I really wish this would be updated to transfer permanent ownership of the site, or even the ability to export and import Strikingly-created websites to share and duplicate easily. My alternative solution has been to completely recreate the site under my client's account and copy it inch by inch. Then, delete the old site on my side and they have an up and running version on their side. It's time consuming, but luckily Strikingly is simple so it's less complicated.

description: I would consider using strikingly again for a start-up, DIY website...however, knowing it's limitations and your vision for growth, it may not be the best platform.
author: Jen R.
pros: I started using a Strikingly website that someone else set up. It is easy to modify the site's graphics or content, and to fill orders.
cons: Sending marketing emails via the platform is an additional fee rather than included in the Pro website, which is frustrating. Also, the connectivity is limited. Strikingly does not connect with Zapier, so integrations are not really possible with our shipping platform and our CRM.

description: Generally, it is really recommended given its simplicity, especially for a beginner
author: Mory M.
pros: I really like its side, it allows anyone to create their website without advanced knowledge in the field
cons: Sometimes it's hard for me to use it its my Android
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A very nice website building software
description: If you're a new business and you're looking for a website building software, I would recommend strikingly because it has everything required to start and run your business smoothlyVery nice software for business or bloggers
author: Favour N.
pros: First of all, I like the fact that it has a free plan and the free plan isn't restricted to just few features.I also like the fact that it has very nice website templates to choose from, I really love the templates, there are various templates for all kinds of business and that's really great.Another thing I like about this software is the fact that it helped me grow my contact list by collecting customers emails, I think that's a very nice thing for a website builder software.Lastly I like the fact that this software has a domain feature, where you could select or purchase a domain for your business.
cons: It would really be nice if they could improve the ease of use, I don't like the fact that it's not easy to use, it's site is kind of confusing to use, there are lots of things I don't really understand when using the software.Aside from the ease of use, the software is a very nice one for building websites and finding domains for business.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Good enough and easy to use almost all systems
author: Ismaël D.
pros: The editor is very easy to use, especially on mobile
cons: Definitely no issues with the tool despite its multiple features
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Magnifica solucion web y dominio gratis
description: Fácil de usar, tiene chat, control de audiencia, ediciones rápidas y se publica en instantes.
author: Bryan Jerico B.
pros: El diseño de la pagina de inicio es simple pero al entrar a la edicion de la web, Waoooo es impresionante la calidad de funciones que hay y lo maravilloso que puede simplicar la vida al crear una web.
cons: No me gusta que para poder usar el chat, se tenga que pagar. Creo que es una de las funciones que muchas personas buscan de forma gratuita.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: it's Easy to use and they have a Good customer service.
cons: Can be overwhelming when choosing a template.

review_title: puissant outil de création de site web
description: j'aime ce logiciel en général ; rien a signalé

pros: très facile d'utilisation , on se sent familier aux différentes fonctions je le recommande vraiment pour tout ceux qui cherchent a avoir des sites web fiables
cons: il faudrait revoir le prix pour certaines bourses

review_title: La edición de mi web es moderna
description: Me ha gustado y además que te ofrece una prueba gratuita de la versión VIP. Las ediciones fueron rápidos y fáciles de usar.
author: Rosa maria M.
pros: Me gusta que no haya necesidad de pagar para poder publicar tu web y además que tenga muchas herramientas de edición y al subir fotos /videos.
cons: Ojala se pudiera arrastrar las fotos y los iconos para poder editar a la manera que uno quiera.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Support technique lamentable, et fonctionnalités très basiques
description: Support technique assez lent, pour des problèmes techniques important ne vous réponde pas (ils vous disent juste qu'ils s'en occupent. A l'heure d'aujourd'hui toujours pas résolu.
author: Elisabeth G.
pros: duplication de site web, copie et déplacement des sections
cons: Support technique quasiment inexistant, vous laisse en plan sur des problèmes techniques graves venant de leur côté. Templates très basique, personnalisation pied de page plus que basique.
